candidate.name: Sample RevOps Manager
candidate.cvText:
Director of Revenue Operations at Notion
Austin, TX
7 years operations; sales ops, marketing ops, full revenue stack.

Director, Revenue Operations · Notion · Austin, TX
- Lead 4-person RevOps team; own GTM tooling stack across sales, marketing, success
- Revenue operations, sales operations, GTM operations, RevOps strategy
- Salesforce admin, CRM administration, salesforce administrator, deal desk
- Pipeline hygiene, territory planning, quota planning, forecasting models, compensation planning
- Sales analytics, attribution modeling, lead routing logic, MQL/SQL definitions
- Tools: Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, Gong, Looker, Tableau, dbt, Snowflake, LeanData
- Process optimization, forecast accuracy, board reporting cadence
knownIssues: cv-pulse rubric mismatch (upstream): role_type='revops' (lowercase) doesn't match ALL_ROLES ['RevOps'] (case-sensitive) → defaults to AE rubric. CV has strong RevOps signal — detectRole should return 'RevOps' from CV with hits >= 3 once the case-sensitivity is fixed.

Matcher behaviour confirmed: cross-family RevOps → AE/CSM with mid cvScore (60/55) + family penalty (35/30) lands at None (35/36). Family floor cap of 55 doesn't help below 55. Defensible — the matcher is correctly penalising cross-family with a low CV signal.

jobs.title: Mid-Market Account Executive
jobs.note: Cross-family (sales) with mid cvScore. Matcher correctly returns None (35) — family penalty 35 below floor-cap.

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Manager
jobs.note: Adjacent family (revops→marketing=25). Family floor cap applies → Partial (54).

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager, Mid-Market
jobs.note: Cross-family with mid cvScore. Matcher returns None (36).

jobs.title: Revenue Operations Manager — EMEA
jobs.note: Same family, cross-region onsite — location floor cap.
